name: HYTE Y70 Dual Chamber ATX Mid-Tower Modern Computer Case - Black - 3-Piece anoramic Glass - PCIe 4.0 Express Riser Cable Included - Support up to 4 Slot Vertical Graphics - 2x USB-A 3.2 Gen 1 - 1x USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 (CS-HYTE-Y70-B)
shortName: HYTE Y70 Dual Chamber ATX Mid-Tower Modern Computer Case - Black
description: ATX mid-tower dual chamber case in black with panoramic glass and PCIe 4.0 riser cable for vertical GPU mounting.
